falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes below the 200-day moving average (200DMA) by 3% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below key support would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a confirmed bearish trend contrary to the bottom pattern expectation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 50% above the 14-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top or panic selling, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implication of a bottoming process.
A blowoff score above 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the pattern's similarity to a bottom and invalidating the 'HOLD' verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
